mainEntity.name: New York vs Los Angeles: Which city lawyers get more ChatGPT recommendations?
mainEntity.text: New York vs Los Angeles: Which city lawyers get more ChatGPT recommendations?

acceptedAnswer.text: New York lawyers get more ChatGPT recommendations due to denser competition, higher directory listings like Justia, and frequent 'best NYC lawyer' queries vs LA's spread-out market.

suggestedAnswer.text: NY's media hub boosts visibility; LA relies on entertainment law niches. Compare via ChatGPT tests. For firms, target underserved areas. Warning: Cross-jurisdiction claims can invite ethics complaints.
